topic: agentic knowledge memory systems with semantic search knowledge graphs and contradiction detection
basis: Each profile reruns the same component signals with a different weight vector and the same per-paper missing-component normalization.
Retracted-paper score caps are preserved across profiles.
Rank sensitivity is an audit signal: stable papers are robust to these weighting choices; volatile papers need closer inspection before treating the order as decisive.
Profiles are product-defined stress tests, not empirical proof that a field values those weights.

profiles.label: Balanced PaperRank
profiles.description: Default PaperRank weighting: topical relevance plus citation impact, graph prestige, velocity, methodology, and reproducibility.

profiles.label: Influence Heavy
profiles.description: Stresses citation impact and local citation-network prestige.

profiles.label: Method + Reproducibility Heavy
profiles.description: Stresses visible methodology and reproducibility evidence over popularity.

profiles.label: Frontier Heavy
profiles.description: Stresses recent citation velocity while keeping topic and quality checks active.

profiles.label: Topic Heavy
profiles.description: Stresses query match when the user wants the most on-topic starting point.

papers.title: Knowledge graph refinement: A survey of approaches and evaluation methods
